---
title: "Kate H. Brown"
---

## Kate H. Brown

**Dates:** (b. Salisbury 1871/2)

### Description

schoolmistress

### Biography

Found in the Salisbury Diocesan Training School during the 1891 census.

### Letters

- Letter from Sept 2 [1893[[footnote:1]]]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
